allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([\(a['id'],a['status']\) for a in d['artifacts']]\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('applyRequires:', d['applyRequires']\); print\('artifacts:', [\(a['id'],a['status']\) for a in d['artifacts']]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(t['done'], t['description']\) for t in d['tasks'] if not t['done']]")
